title: Petrified Enhanced
description: This will add more variants of Petrified Oak Slab. And can be obtained in survival game.
body:
About the mod
--

As the summary says, this mod adds few new variants of Petrified Slabs.

And its made with MCreator..


Difference
--

• Texture-wise, it looks same as normal slabs.

• Don't burn when surrounded by fire.

• Don't burn when surrounded by lava.

• Act like a Stone slab.

Note 
--
*Petrified Oak Slab is removed by Mojang in Creative Tabs as of 1.20*. 

 How to Craft 
--

 It can be obtained in Survival gameplay. Just put these like this in crafting table:

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Jlsjfl3p/images/9a0df11bf1fb5a2fa1984a0c443ef78c839641a0.png)

   FAQ 
--
 
i. Forge support?

Nope I hate it because its laggy but yeah, if this mod got 100 Downloads on Modrinth, then I'll ~~make~~ think.


ii. Will be updated regularly?

 Uh maybe but what do you want more in a slab mod, I'll just update to new version and add recipe of new variant. That's it..?

iii. Can I ~~steal~~ port your mod or do something I want to do?

It depends, you have to credit me or ask me on Discord.

 Connect with me 
--
 [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pmuser/),
 [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@infoyps),
 Discord: infoytech#3778
